title: Stained Glass Ultra
description: More opaque stained glass! It's stained, not tinted!
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/pOZJiUl.png)   [![](https://i.imgur.com/8PBAy1i.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/metals-ultra)   [![](https://i.imgur.com/qPdqhzs.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/create-ultra-pbr)


 

In my opinion Minecrafts stained glass is way too transparent. This resource pack changes that. Stained glass and stained glass pains are way more opaque and vibrant, allowing for more satisfiying effects when building with them. You can finally build skyscrapers made of glass that don't look like they're floating in thin air! There's also a set of less opaque custom item textures included so they still look like glass in inventories.

 

Supports shaders via LabPBR!

 

**MOD SUPPORT:**   * [**Connected Glass Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/connected-glass) - For Clear Glass and Connecting glass, also adds labPBR support for scratched and tinted glass!   * **[Wunderreich](https://modrinth.com/mod/wunderreich) -** Stained glass slabs (including labPBR support)

 

Should be compatible with every Minecraft version starting 1.8, the "incompatible" warning is safe to ignore. Make sure to position this pack ABOVE every other resource pack that alters stained glass!

 

![](https://i.imgur.com/AQtDQr3.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/jByRu0u.png)
